page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8i.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8475B processor. Operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz, this instance features 12 physical cores and 12 vCPUs, indicating a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration with dedicated CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 24.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It runs on a KVM hypervisor.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The instance does not feature any GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The 1:2 ratio of vCPUs to memory classifies this instance as a compute-optimized resource, prioritizing processing density over memory capacity.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and lack of hyperthreading ensure predictable compute performance without resource contention, though the absence of bundled local storage requires factoring in the cost of external storage. The hardware profile is suited for compute-intensive workloads such as web serving, batch processing, and application servers that require dedicated CPU resources but have modest memory requirements.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8i.3xlarge is a compute-optimized x86_64 server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 12 physical cores and 12 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 24.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance is designed for workloads requiring predictable, dedicated CPU performance with moderate memory needs, such as web serving, batch processing, and application hosting.
